correctness.question: Output đúng yêu cầu không?
correctness.description: Does the artifact match the schema + the per-stage expected shape?

completeness.question: Có thiếu case nào không?
completeness.description: Are all required fields present? Are edge cases covered (empty, large, malformed)?

grounding.question: Có evidence từ code/docs không?
grounding.description: Do claims cite code paths / source docs / upstreams? No fabrication.

safety.question: Có vi phạm permission/security không?
safety.description: Did the agent respect tools_denied? Did it avoid blocked paths? Did it self-validate?

maintainability.question: Code/output dễ maintain không?
maintainability.description: Is the artifact small, well-named, refactor-delta documented? Is dead code present?

testability.question: Có test/check rõ không?
testability.description: Is there a pre-submit checklist? A smoke test? An eval-case for this skill?

cost.question: Có dùng quá nhiều context/tool không?
cost.description: Token count, tool call count, retry count within sane bounds?

reproducibility.question: Lần sau chạy lại có ra kết quả ổn định?
